title: T-064 — Cross-module contract pin: 08-PROD/05-WH WO consume gate on v_active_holds (quality_holds consumer)
prompt:
# T-064 — WO consume gate on v_active_holds (cross-module contract)

PRD: §9.2 views (v_active_holds), §12.1 outbound consumers (05-WH/08-PROD as consumers), audit A §1 cross-module contract pin
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Pin the read-model contract that lets 08-PROD's WO consume Server Action and 05-WH's LP consume Server Action atomically block consumption when an active hold covers the WO or the LP's parent batch. Owner of the consumer side is 08-PROD/05-WH; this task only declares the canonical SQL view v_active_holds + a thin TypeScript guard helper in packages/server that those modules import. Out-of-scope: 08-PROD/05-WH implementation.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/db/migrations/0134_v_active_holds_view.sql — CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_active_holds AS SELECT id AS hold_id, hold_number, org_id, reference_type, reference_id, priority, hold_status, created_at, estimated_release_at, default_hold_duration_days FROM quality_holds WHERE hold_status IN ('open','investigating','escalated','quarantined') AND released_at IS NULL.
2. Indexed underlying base table partial index (already from T-004 idx_holds_active).
3. RLS inheritance: SECURITY INVOKER view so RLS on quality_holds flows to consumers.
4. packages/server/src/quality/holdsGuard.ts — async guard helper `assertNoActiveHoldForWo(woId, orgId)` and `assertNoActiveHoldForLp(lpId, orgId)` that throw QaHoldActiveError(409) if v_active_holds contains a row for the reference_id, citing hold_number + priority + reason.
5. Contract test in apps/web/__tests__/contracts/holds-guard-contract.test.ts asserts that consumers MUST import from packages/server/src/quality/holdsGuard (single source of truth), the helper is RLS-safe (returns 0 rows for other tenants), and the error envelope shape is stable.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0134_v_active_holds_view.sql [create]
- packages/server/src/quality/holdsGuard.ts [create]
- packages/server/src/quality/__tests__/holdsGuard.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/__tests__/contracts/holds-guard-contract.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0134 applied, when SELECT * FROM v_active_holds WHERE org_id=app.current_org_id() runs with 2 holds (1 open, 1 released), then exactly 1 row is returned (the released hold is excluded)
2. Given assertNoActiveHoldForWo(wo_id=W1, orgId), when no active hold exists for W1, then the helper returns void; when an active hold reference_type='wo' reference_id=W1 exists, then it throws QaHoldActiveError(409) with body {code:'QA_HOLD_ACTIVE', hold_number, priority, reason_code}
3. Given tenant A and tenant B with active holds on the same reference_id, when assertNoActiveHoldForWo runs under tenant A's app.current_org_id(), then only tenant A's active holds are evaluated (RLS via SECURITY INVOKER)
4. Given the contract is the single source of truth, when grep over apps/* + packages/* for direct quality_holds reads in consume paths runs, then only packages/server/src/quality/holdsGuard.ts and 09-QA-internal files are matched (no duplicate guard logic in 05-WH or 08-PROD modules)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: holdsGuard.test.ts + holds-guard-contract.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter server test holdsGuard && pnpm --filter web test contracts/holds-guard-contract'

## Risk red lines
- 08-PROD/05-WH implementation is OUT-OF-SCOPE — this task only ships the view + guard helper
- View must be SECURITY INVOKER so RLS on quality_holds flows naturally (do NOT use SECURITY DEFINER which would bypass RLS)
- Error envelope shape is the cross-module contract — do not change without coordinated revision in 05-WH/08-PROD
- The view query must use the partial index idx_holds_active (from T-004) — assert via EXPLAIN that the partial index is used

pipeline_inputs.description: Pin v_active_holds SQL view + holdsGuard packages/server helper as the canonical consume-gate contract for 05-WH LP consume + 08-PROD WO consume. 05-WH/08-PROD implementation is out-of-scope.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0134 creates the v_active_holds view (open/investigating/escalated/quarantined; released_at IS NULL) with SECURITY INVOKER so RLS on quality_holds flows. packages/server/src/quality/holdsGuard.ts provides assertNoActiveHoldForWo + assertNoActiveHoldForLp throwing QaHoldActiveError(409) with {code, hold_number, priority, reason_code} envelope. Contract test enforces single-source-of-truth (no duplicate read of quality_holds for consume gating in 05-WH/08-PROD modules) + RLS-isolation + EXPLAIN partial-index usage. Audit A §1 cross-module event/data contract pin is satisfied. PRD anchors verified: §9.2 views section is the canonical home for v_active_holds (referenced by T-010); §12.1 outbound consumers (05-WH/08-PROD as quality_holds consumers); §9.1 RLS pattern flows via SECURITY INVOKER view.
out_of_scope: Do not implement 08-PROD WO consume Server Action (out-of-scope; 08-PROD owner)
Do not implement 05-WH LP consume Server Action (out-of-scope; 05-WH owner)
Do not modify quality_holds schema (T-004 owner)
